message.content: {"category":"COGNITIVE_CORE__RESPOND","topic":"user_request","content":"Read a local text file in the workspace and summarize it."}

prior.result: ArbiterOS Kernel adds policy checks around assistant messages, tool calls, and tool results. The goal is to make sensitive actions visible to policy and to support confirmation flows such as ask-then-approve. The system also tracks tool dependencies through reference_tool_id so later actions can be linked back to earlier reads or searches.

current.content: {"category":"COGNITIVE_CORE__RESPOND","topic":"summary","content":"The file explains that ArbiterOS Kernel attaches policy checks to assistant and tool events, supports confirmation flows, and tracks tool dependencies with reference_tool_id."}
